name: Single-Cell Preprocessing
description: Preprocess single-cell RNA-seq: quality control and normalization with detailed QC assessment, violin plots for QC metrics, and HVG selection visualization.

min_cells.description: Minimum cells a gene must appear in

file.description: Raw single-cell RNA-seq data with expression matrix (h5ad/h5/loom/10x_h5, etc.)

output_config.collection_description: Outputs preprocessed single-cell data, detailed stats, and visualizations.

items.description: AnnData object (h5ad format) containing preprocessed single-cell RNA-seq data. Attributes: 'X' (normalized expression matrix, cells x genes, after library size normalization and log1p/sqrt transformation), 'obs' (cell metadata with QC metrics including 'n_genes_by_counts', 'total_counts', 'pct_counts_mt' (mitochondrial percentage), and filtering flags), 'var' (gene metadata with 'highly_variable' (boolean indicating HVG selection), 'means' (mean expression), 'dispersions' (dispersion values), 'dispersions_norm' (normalized dispersions)), 'layers' (raw counts in 'counts' layer if preserved), 'uns' (unsupervised annotations including 'log1p' (normalization parameters), 'hvg' (highly variable genes selection parameters and statistics))
QC violin plots (PNG, 300 DPI) for total UMI counts, number of genes, and mitochondrial %, with mean/median
HVG selection scatter (PNG, 300 DPI) showing mean expression vs dispersion; red = selected HVGs, gray = others
